positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for space_vampire_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~is_vacuum(X0) | sucks(X0)).

cnf(u30,axiom,
    plunger != vacuum).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    vacuum != space).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    vampire != space).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    vacuum != duster).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    vampire != duster).

cnf(u15,axiom,
    sucks(plunger)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    sucks(vampire)).

cnf(u27,axiom,
    plunger != duster).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    sucks(vacuum)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    vacuum != vampire).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~sucks(duster)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    is_vacuum(space)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    plunger != vampire).

cnf(u28,axiom,
    plunger != space).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    space != duster).

cnf(u31,axiom,
    sucks(space)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define is_vampire(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
